title: Agent streaming UI: session panel, header ticker, sprite status
description: Three connected frontend changes all driven by the existing sessionActivities WebSocket data. (1) Enhance AgentPanel to show a streaming log of tool calls. (2) Add rolling status ticker to GameHeader. (3) Fix sprite status text in renderer.ts.

scope.in: AgentPanel streaming log, GameHeader ticker, renderer.ts sprite status text, supporting data flow changes
scope.out: Server/backend changes, new WebSocket message types, LogPanel refactoring

dod.criterion: AgentPanel shows a streaming CLI-style log of recent tool calls per session with auto-scroll
GameHeader displays a rolling ticker cycling through active agents showing their current action
Sprite status text uses agent brand colors at readable alpha with dark shadow for contrast

tasks.title: AgentPanel streaming tool-call log with ring buffer
tasks.user_scenario: When viewing an agent's panel, the user sees a scrolling CLI-style log of recent tool calls with file paths, not just the latest single line.
tasks.scope: Add a ring buffer (cap ~50 entries) to AgentPanel.tsx that accumulates sessionActivities snapshots over time. Replace the single ActivityLine display with a scrollable list styled like CLI output (monospace, dark background, auto-scroll to bottom). Each entry shows the tool name and primary file path.

dod.criterion: AgentPanel shows up to 50 recent tool-call entries per agent session, not just the latest one
New entries append at the bottom and the container auto-scrolls to show the latest entry
Each entry displays the tool name and file path in monospace font
Ring buffer drops oldest entries when exceeding 50, with no memory leak
Panel remains performant with 50 entries visible — no visible scroll jank

tasks.title: GameHeader rolling agent status ticker
tasks.user_scenario: The header center area cycles through active agents showing their name and current action.
tasks.scope: Add a rolling ticker component to GameHeader.tsx center area. Thread agentSessionInfos data from GamePage. The ticker cycles through active agents on a 3-4 second interval, showing agent name in brand color and a short status summary. Fall back to date/time when no agents active.

dod.criterion: GameHeader receives agentSessionInfos from GamePage and renders a ticker in the center area
Ticker cycles through active agents every 3-4 seconds showing agent name and current tool/action
Agent name is rendered in their brand color
When no agents have active sessions, the ticker is hidden and only date/time displays
Text is truncated to fit within available center space without layout overflow

tasks.title: Sprite status text: brand-colored, better content
tasks.user_scenario: Agent sprites on the canvas show their current action in the agent's brand color instead of dim barely-visible white text.
tasks.scope: In renderer.ts around lines 752-768, replace hardcoded '#FFFFFF' at 0.35 alpha with the agent's brand color from identity.colorMap at higher opacity. Show the agent's current tool/action. Add dark shadow for readability.

dod.criterion: Sprite status text uses the agent's brand color from identity.colorMap instead of hardcoded white
Text alpha is 0.8 or higher (clearly readable, not the previous 0.35)
Status text shows the agent's current tool/action from streaming data when available
Text has a dark shadow or outline for readability against light tile backgrounds
bitmapFont.ts is not modified — only the color/alpha values passed to existing render calls change
